title: Monday's Cronogram to offer an option to avoid placing tasks on Weekend
excerpt: My team makes extensive use of chronograms through dependencies and duration setups, this often ends up with tasks falling in the weekend range, it would be super to just deactivate this option for everyone at the compan…

posts.author: DiegoL (Diego)
posts.cookedHtml: My team makes extensive use of chronograms through dependencies and duration setups, this often ends up with tasks falling in the weekend range, it would be super to just deactivate this option for everyone at the company so we all ensure we can keep using this semi automated setup of dates without having to worry to leave tasks in the weekend.

posts.author: ggrudo (Gideon Grudo)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ll up the ante. I use Zapier for a substantial task setup because it lets me do myriad things monday doesn’t, among them the ability to skip assigning due dates on weekends and company holidays—but once set up in Monday, changing dependent tasks will push future ones into weekends and holidays. With the new work schedule capabilities, I’d love to see the ability to say that due dates should never fall on either, and instead push to the next business day.
